---
title: &TITLE Evelia Lorena Coss Navarrete
last: Coss
first: Evelia
people_group: postdoc
email: "ecoss@liigh.unam.mx"
education:
  - Ph.D. Plant Biotechnology | Cinvestav, Langebio
subtitle: Postdoctoral researcher
description: ""
bio: "I am Evelia Lorena Coss Navarrete, a postdoctoral researcher at the International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH), UNAM. I specialize in bioinformatics, transcriptomic analysis, and reproducible scientific documentation. I hold a Bachelor’s degree in Biotechnology Engineering, and both my MSc. and Ph.D. in Plant Biotechnology from CINVESTAV. My doctoral research focused on the identification and characterization of long non-coding RNAs in Brassicaceae. Beyond research, I actively contribute to scientific communities as a member of R-Ladies Morelia, CDSB Mexico, RiaBio, and ISCB RSG-Mexico. I am also the lead organizer of VieRnes de Bioinformática at LIIGH, a collaborative initiative that fosters dialogue, training, and community-building in bioinformatics."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ecoss@liigh.unam.mx
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_mN7_1cAAAAJ&hl=es
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/EveliaCoss
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
